name: Sex Life or Sexual Orientation
description: Sexual orientation, gender identity, or data about an individual's sex life.

regulatory_basis.name: GDPR Article 9(1)
regulatory_basis.summary: Data concerning sex life or sexual orientation is a special category of personal data.

regulatory_basis.name: US Fair Housing Act (as interpreted)
regulatory_basis.summary: HUD interprets sex discrimination to include sexual orientation and gender identity in housing advertising.

includes: Gender identity data beyond binary male/female
Relationship status when linked to sexual orientation
excludes: Binary gender (male/female) for demographic targeting — covered by sex discrimination rules, not this category
guidance: This category covers sexual orientation and gender identity specifically, not binary gender targeting. Binary gender (male/female) used for demographic targeting is regulated separately under sex discrimination rules in housing/employment/credit verticals.
